title: Delete RunPod branch + promote 1.2 -> master @ 1.1.0, fork new 1.2.0
description: REVISED 2026-07-09 (was: delete RunPod + rename 1.2->1.1). New flow, part of the release train after the public v1.0.1 GitHub release: (1) delete RunPod branch local+remote (precond verified: `git log RunPod --not 1.2` empty). (2) merge 1.2 -> master via mpi-merge-branches, bump 1.0.1 -> 1.1.0 (minor), fold+clear UNRELEASED, fresh condensed changelog, mint new Cloudflare link. (3) fork a new branch `1.2.0` off master and bump it 1.1.0 -> 1.2.0 as the new dev line. Push + build + Cloudflare = user-authorized live ops.
